name: Maximus Resources Limited
summary: Maximus Resources Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration and development of mineral properties in Australia. It primarily explores for gold, copper, nickel, and platinum group element deposits. The company holds an interest in the Spargoville project in the south of the regional mining center of Kalgoorlie. Maximus Resources Limited was incorporated in 2004 and is based in Eastwood, Australia.
